expression: Can I give you some feedback on that?
literalTranslation: 我能就那件事给你一些反馈吗？
naturalMeaning: 礼貌地征求对方的同意后再给反馈，而不是直接说出来，体现尊重。
example: Hey, can I give you some feedback on that presentation you just gave?
exampleTranslation: 嘿，我能对你刚才的演讲给点反馈吗？

expression: One thing that could make this even stronger is...
literalTranslation: 有一件事可以让这个变得更强的是……
naturalMeaning: 用积极框架提出改进建议，先说优点再说改进点，让对方更愿意接受。
example: One thing that could make this even stronger is adding more concrete data to back up your claims.
exampleTranslation: 有一件事可以让这个更强，就是加更多具体数据来支撑你的观点。

expression: Have you thought about trying it this way?
literalTranslation: 你有没有想过试试这样做？
naturalMeaning: 试探性地提出另一种做法，而不是直接说对方做错了。
example: Have you thought about trying it this way — sending the draft to the team first before going to the client?
exampleTranslation: 你有没有想过试试这样做——先把草稿发给团队再发给客户？

expression: The way I see it...
literalTranslation: 我看待这件事的方式是……
naturalMeaning: 明确表示这是个人观点，不是绝对正确的答案，给对方留讨论空间。
example: The way I see it, the main issue isn't the timeline but how we're prioritizing the tasks.
exampleTranslation: 我看啊，主要问题不是时间线，而是我们怎么给任务排优先级。

expression: Something to chew on
literalTranslation: 可以咀嚼的东西
naturalMeaning: 给对方一个值得思考的点，不强迫立刻接受，让对方回去琢磨。
example: Here's something to chew on — what if we flipped the order of the onboarding process?
exampleTranslation: 有个事儿你可以琢磨琢磨——如果我们把入职流程的顺序反过来呢？

expression: I don't know if this is helpful, but...
literalTranslation: 我不知道这个有没有用，但是……
naturalMeaning: 用谦虚的语气提出建议，降低对方的防备心理。
example: I don't know if this is helpful, but I noticed the code review turnaround has been slower when PRs go out on Friday afternoons.
exampleTranslation: 不知道这个有没有用，但我注意到周五下午发的 PR 审核周转比较慢。

expression: Mind if I share a thought?
literalTranslation: 你介意我分享一个想法吗？
naturalMeaning: 极其随和地请求发言机会，比正式征询更轻松自然。
example: Mind if I share a thought on the deployment strategy you just outlined?
exampleTranslation: 我能就你刚才说的部署策略说两句吗？

expression: Let me play devil's advocate here
literalTranslation: 让我来扮演一下魔鬼代言人
naturalMeaning: 主动提出不同观点来挑战现有方案，目的是让讨论更全面，不是唱反调。
example: Let me play devil's advocate here — what happens if the API goes down right during the launch?
exampleTranslation: 我来唱个反调啊——如果发布会期间 API 挂了怎么办？

expression: I've noticed something I wanted to mention
literalTranslation: 我注意到一件事想提一下
naturalMeaning: 温和地引出观察结果，不是批评，而是分享看到的现象。
example: I've noticed something I wanted to mention — you've been staying really late lately to finish tickets.
exampleTranslation: 我注意到一件事想提一下——你最近为了完成任务每天都待到很晚。

expression: That's fair
literalTranslation: 那很公平
naturalMeaning: 承认对方的批评有道理，表示接受对方观点。非常简短自然的回应。
example: "I think you could have communicated the timeline earlier." "Yeah, that's fair. I should have."
exampleTranslation: "我觉得你应该早点沟通时间线。""嗯，有道理，我确实应该。"

expression: I hear what you're saying
literalTranslation: 我听到你在说什么了
naturalMeaning: 表示听到了对方的话并理解，但不一定完全同意，比直接说"我同意"更中立。
example: I hear what you're saying about the sprint being too packed, and I think we can trim some items.
exampleTranslation: 我理解你说的 sprint 任务安排太满了，我觉得我们可以删掉一些。

expression: Say more about that
literalTranslation: 再多说说那个
naturalMeaning: 邀请对方进一步阐述，表示你对他说的感兴趣，想听更多细节。
example: "I feel like the standup format isn't working." "Okay, say more about that — what specifically isn't working?"
exampleTranslation: "我觉得站会的形式不太好。""好，展开说说——具体哪里不好？"

expression: I appreciate you flagging that
literalTranslation: 我感谢你标记了那个
naturalMeaning: 感谢对方指出问题或提出意见，"flag"在这里是动词，意为提醒注意。
example: I appreciate you flagging that the deployment script has a bug — saved us a lot of trouble.
exampleTranslation: 谢谢你指出部署脚本有 bug 这件事——帮我们省了大麻烦。

expression: I'll sit with that for a bit
literalTranslation: 我会和那个坐一会儿
naturalMeaning: 需要时间消化和思考刚收到的反馈，不是拒绝，而是要认真想想。
example: That's a really interesting point about my communication style. I'll sit with that for a bit.
exampleTranslation: 关于我沟通方式这个问题很有意思，我回去消化一下。

expression: Can you help me understand what you mean?
literalTranslation: 你能帮我理解你的意思吗？
naturalMeaning: 礼貌地请求对方讲得更清楚一些，不是质疑，而是真心想弄明白。
example: You said the onboarding docs could be better. Can you help me understand what you mean by better?
exampleTranslation: 你说入职文档可以更好，能帮我理解一下你说的"更好"具体指什么吗？

expression: I never thought of it that way
literalTranslation: 我从没那样想过
naturalMeaning: 表示对方的观点给了你新的视角，真诚地表示学到了新东西。
example: "Maybe the delay wasn't a failure — it gave us time to rethink the architecture." "Huh, I never thought of it that way."
exampleTranslation: "也许这次延迟不是失败——它给了我们重新思考架构的时间。""哈，我还真没这么想过。"

expression: That's really helpful context
literalTranslation: 那是非常有帮助的背景信息
naturalMeaning: 感谢对方提供背景信息，表示这些信息对理解问题很有用。
example: Oh, I didn't realize the client changed the requirements last week. That's really helpful context.
exampleTranslation: 哦，我没意识到客户上周改了需求，这个背景信息太有用了。

expression: Okay, noted
literalTranslation: 好的，记下了
naturalMeaning: 简短表示收到反馈，不展开讨论。常见于不愿意继续深谈或认可但不想多说的情况。
example: "Just a heads up, the build was failing earlier." "Okay, noted. I'll check it out."
exampleTranslation: "提醒一下，刚才构建失败了。""好的，知道了，我去看看。"

expression: You crushed that
literalTranslation: 你碾压了那个
naturalMeaning: 非常口语化的表扬，意思是做得非常好、表现极其出色。
example: Dude, you crushed that demo. The client was totally impressed.
exampleTranslation: 老兄，你那个演示太牛了，客户完全被震住了。

expression: That was really well done
literalTranslation: 那个做得非常好
naturalMeaning: 真诚且比较正式的表扬，比"good job"更有分量。
example: That migration you led was really well done. Zero downtime and no regressions.
exampleTranslation: 你主导的那次迁移做得非常好，零停机零回退。

expression: You should feel really good about that
literalTranslation: 你应该对那件事感觉很好
naturalMeaning: 鼓励对方为自己的成就感到自豪，认可付出和成果。
example: Getting that test coverage from 30% to 90% in one quarter is huge. You should feel really good about that.
exampleTranslation: 一个季度把测试覆盖率从 30% 拉到 90% 非常了不起，你应该为此感到自豪。

expression: I love how you handled that
literalTranslation: 我喜欢你处理那件事的方式
naturalMeaning: 热情肯定对方在某个具体情况中的处理方式，非常真诚的表达。
example: I love how you handled that angry customer call — you stayed calm and didn't take it personally.
exampleTranslation: 我特别欣赏你处理那个愤怒客户电话的方式——你很冷静，没有往心里去。

expression: You really stepped up on this one
literalTranslation: 你在这次真的站出来了
naturalMeaning: 表扬对方在关键时刻挺身而出、承担了额外的责任或做出了超出预期的贡献。
example: Nobody asked you to take on the documentation rewrite, but you really stepped up on this one.
exampleTranslation: 没人让你去重写文档，但这次你真的挺身而出了。

expression: That's a great call
literalTranslation: 那是个很棒的决定
naturalMeaning: 赞许对方做出的决策或判断，"call"在这里意为决定/判断。
example: Deciding to roll back the release when you saw the error rate spike — that's a great call.
exampleTranslation: 看到错误率飙升就决定回滚发布——这个决定做得对。

expression: Nice save
literalTranslation: 漂亮的补救
naturalMeaning: 在出了问题后迅速机智地解决了问题，对方会说的赞美之词。
example: When the demo environment crashed and you spun up a new one in five minutes — nice save.
exampleTranslation: 演示环境崩溃时你五分钟内就重新搭了一个——救场太漂亮了。

expression: You're killing it lately
literalTranslation: 你最近在碾压它
naturalMeaning: 非常口语化的表扬，说某人最近状态极好，表现非常出色。
example: Three major features shipped in two sprints? You're killing it lately.
exampleTranslation: 两个 sprint 交付了三个大功能？你最近太猛了。

expression: That really moved the needle
literalTranslation: 那真的拨动了指针
naturalMeaning: 说某件事产生了实质性的影响或改变，不是小打小闹。
example: Your refactoring of the payment service really moved the needle on our latency numbers.
exampleTranslation: 你对支付服务的重构真的让延迟数据有了明显改善。

expression: Let's start with what's going well
literalTranslation: 让我们从进行得顺利的地方开始
naturalMeaning: 绩效面谈时先谈优点再谈改进，让氛围更积极舒服。
example: Before we get into growth areas, let's start with what's going well this quarter.
exampleTranslation: 在我们聊成长空间之前，先说说这季度做得好的地方。

expression: Here's where I see you making the biggest impact
literalTranslation: 这是我认为你产生最大影响的地方
naturalMeaning: 明确告诉对方你最认可他哪方面的贡献，让对方知道自己的价值。
example: Here's where I see you making the biggest impact — your code reviews are thorough and actually help people learn.
exampleTranslation: 我觉得你影响最大的地方是你的代码审查非常细致，而且真的能帮到别人学习。

expression: One thing I'd love to see more of...
literalTranslation: 有一件事我想看到更多……
naturalMeaning: 用积极的方式提出期望的改进，而不是说"你做的不够"。
example: One thing I'd love to see more of is you speaking up in design discussions — you always have good insights.
exampleTranslation: 有一件事我希望你能多做一些，就是在设计讨论中多发言——你的想法一直很好。

expression: You've really leveled up since...
literalTranslation: 自从……以来你真的升级了
naturalMeaning: 肯定对方的进步和成长，"level up"源自游戏，表升级、进步很大。
example: You've really leveled up since you joined — your architectural thinking is night and day from where it was.
exampleTranslation: 你入职以来进步真的很大——现在的架构思维和当初完全不是一个层次了。

expression: Where do you want to be a year from now?
literalTranslation: 一年后你想在哪里？
naturalMeaning: 引导对方思考职业发展方向，了解其长期目标。
example: Where do you want to be a year from now? Because I think you're ready for more ownership on the frontend.
exampleTranslation: 一年后你想达到什么状态？因为我觉得你已经准备好在前端承担更多了。

expression: I want to make sure you're getting what you need from me
literalTranslation: 我想确保你从我这里得到了你需要的
naturalMeaning: 表达管理者对下属的支持态度，主动询问对方是否需要更多资源或帮助。
example: I want to make sure you're getting what you need from me as your manager — is there anything I could be doing better?
exampleTranslation: 我想确保你从我这里得到了你需要的支持——有什么我可以做得更好的吗？

expression: The feedback I'm hearing across the board is...
literalTranslation: 我全面听到的反馈是……
naturalMeaning: 汇总多方意见，表明这不是一个人的看法，而是综合反馈。
example: The feedback I'm hearing across the board is that you're incredibly reliable and people trust your estimates.
exampleTranslation: 我汇总到的各方面反馈是，你非常可靠，大家相信你的工时评估。

expression: Let's talk about what's next for you
literalTranslation: 我们来谈谈你的下一步
naturalMeaning: 开启关于职业发展路径的对话，表示对对方成长的关注。
example: You've been in this role for about 18 months now. Let's talk about what's next for you.
exampleTranslation: 你在现在的岗位大约 18 个月了，我们来聊聊你的下一步。

expression: You're on the right track
literalTranslation: 你在正确的轨道上
naturalMeaning: 肯定对方方向是对的、做法正确，给予信心和鼓励。
example: You're on the right track with the modular approach, just keep breaking things down into smaller pieces.
exampleTranslation: 你走模块化这个方向是对的，继续拆成更小的块就行了。

expression: I just wanted to say I really appreciate how you...
literalTranslation: 我只是想说我真的感谢你如何……
naturalMeaning: 平级之间表达真诚感谢，具体指出对方做了什么事让你感激。
example: I just wanted to say I really appreciate how you jumped in to help debug that production issue on Saturday.
exampleTranslation: 我就是想说，我真的特别感谢你周六主动帮忙排查那个生产环境问题。

expression: You were a huge help on that last project
literalTranslation: 你在上个项目上帮了大忙
naturalMeaning: 平级之间认可对方的贡献，"huge help"表示非常大的帮助。
example: You were a huge help on that last project — I would've been stuck on the database migration without you.
exampleTranslation: 你在上个项目上帮了我大忙——没有你我肯定卡在数据库迁移上。

expression: I learned a lot watching how you handled that
literalTranslation: 看着你处理那件事我学到了很多
naturalMeaning: 用向对方学习来作为赞美，非常真诚，平级之间说出来分量很重。
example: I learned a lot watching how you handled that stakeholder meeting — you really know how to read the room.
exampleTranslation: 看你处理那个 stakeholder 会议我学到了很多，你真的太会察言观色了。

expression: Can I be totally honest with you?
literalTranslation: 我能对你完全诚实吗？
naturalMeaning: 表示接下来要说真话、不是客套，用于建立信任关系的反馈开场。
example: Can I be totally honest with you? I think your code is solid, but the PR descriptions need more context.
exampleTranslation: 能跟你实话实说吗？我觉得你的代码没问题，但 PR 描述需要多写一些上下文。

expression: No one catches the stuff you catch
literalTranslation: 没有人能发现你发现的那些东西
naturalMeaning: 特别认可对方在某个方面的独特能力，说对方在这方面无人能及。
example: No one catches the stuff you catch in code review — you always spot the edge cases everyone else misses.
exampleTranslation: 代码审查这块没人比得上你——你总能发现别人注意不到的边界情况。

expression: Thanks for having my back on that one
literalTranslation: 谢谢在那件事上支持我
naturalMeaning: 感谢同事在困难或争议中站在你这边，"have my back"意为支持我。
example: Thanks for having my back on that one during the meeting — I was getting grilled pretty hard.
exampleTranslation: 谢谢你在会上支持我——我当时被问得挺狠的。

expression: You're the person I go to when I need...
literalTranslation: 当我有……需求时，你是我找的那个人
naturalMeaning: 告诉对方你在团队中的独特定位和不可替代性，是极高的认可。
example: You're the person I go to when I need to understand the legacy system — nobody knows it better than you.
exampleTranslation: 我需要了解遗留系统时就找你——没人比你更懂它了。

expression: I love working with you because...
literalTranslation: 我喜欢和你共事因为……
naturalMeaning: 直接表达对和对方合作的喜爱，后面跟上具体原因，非常有力量。
example: I love working with you because you always catch the things I overlook before they become problems.
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢和你共事，因为你总是在问题变大之前就发现我忽略的东西。

expression: Quick observation from the sidelines...
literalTranslation: 从旁边快速观察到一个事儿……
naturalMeaning: 以旁观者的角度给出轻松、低压力的观察反馈，不是正式批评。
example: Quick observation from the sidelines — you tend to interrupt people when you get excited about an idea.
exampleTranslation: 旁观者视角说一句——你一兴奋就容易打断别人说话。

expression: Here's what I'm hearing from the team
literalTranslation: 这是我从团队那里听到的
naturalMeaning: 汇总团队反馈时使用，表示不是个人观点，是多方收集的意见。
example: Here's what I'm hearing from the team — people really value how available you are when they're blocked.
exampleTranslation: 这是我从团队那里听到的——大家都很感激你在他门遇到阻碍时随时都在。

expression: People really trust your judgment on...
literalTranslation: 大家真的很信任你在……上的判断
naturalMeaning: 360反馈中告诉对方团队对他的信任程度，非常正面的反馈。
example: People really trust your judgment on technical decisions, which is a huge asset for the team.
exampleTranslation: 大家在技术决策上非常信任你的判断，这对团队来说是一笔巨大的财富。

expression: The theme I keep hearing is...
literalTranslation: 我反复听到的一个主题是……
naturalMeaning: 总结多条反馈中的共同点，让反馈更可信，不是一个人的意见。
example: The theme I keep hearing is that you communicate really well but sometimes overwhelm people with too much detail at once.
exampleTranslation: 我反复听到的一个点是，你沟通能力很强，但有时一次性说太多细节会让人应接不暇。

expression: A few people have mentioned that...
literalTranslation: 有几个人提到……
naturalMeaning: 用匿名方式传达多个人的反馈，让对方知道这不是个案。
example: A few people have mentioned that your standup updates tend to run long and cover too much detail.
exampleTranslation: 有几个人提到你的站会汇报时间偏长，细节太多。

expression: Everyone I talked to mentioned how you...
literalTranslation: 我聊过的每个人都提到你如何……
naturalMeaning: 强调正面反馈的一致性，告诉对方所有被访谈的人都认可某一点。
example: Everyone I talked to mentioned how you made them feel welcome when they joined the team.
exampleTranslation: 我聊过的每个人都说，你让他们在加入团队时感到非常受欢迎。

expression: There's a gap between how you see it and how the team sees it
literalTranslation: 你的看法和团队的看法之间有个差距
naturalMeaning: 温和地指出对方自我认知和他人认知不一致，常用于360反馈中有建设性的环节。
example: There's a gap between how you see it and how the team sees it — you think you're too quiet in meetings, but everyone says you speak up at the right moments.
exampleTranslation: 你对自己的看法和团队的看法不太一样——你觉得自己开会太安静，但大家说你发言的时机都很好。

expression: From what I've gathered, the team feels...
literalTranslation: 据我收集到的信息，团队觉得……
naturalMeaning: 温和地传达团队的集体感受，用"gathered"表示信息是多方收集来的。
example: From what I've gathered, the team feels like decisions are sometimes made without enough context shared beforehand.
exampleTranslation: 据我了解，团队觉得有些决策在做之前没有分享足够的背景信息。

expression: Multiple people highlighted your ability to...
literalTranslation: 多个人强调了你的能力……
naturalMeaning: 正面反馈时引用多人的评价，增加分量的真实性。
example: Multiple people highlighted your ability to simplify complex technical concepts for non-technical stakeholders.
exampleTranslation: 好几个人都提到了你能够把复杂的技术概念给非技术背景的人讲清楚。

expression: I need to be straight with you
literalTranslation: 我需要对你直说
naturalMeaning: 表示接下来要坦白直接地说难听的话，不拐弯抹角。
example: I need to be straight with you — your recent commits have had more bugs than usual and it's affecting the team's velocity.
exampleTranslation: 我得跟你直说——你最近的提交 bug 比平时多，已经影响到团队速度了。

expression: This is going to be tough to hear
literalTranslation: 这个话可能不太好听
naturalMeaning: 在说出难听的话之前给对方心理准备，体现同理心。
example: This is going to be tough to hear, but the project didn't meet the quality bar we need for a launch.
exampleTranslation: 这话可能不太好听，但这个项目没有达到发布需要的质量标准。

expression: I'm going to level with you
literalTranslation: 我要跟你平起平坐地说话
naturalMeaning: 表示接下来要说实话、不藏着掖着，比"be honest"更有「拉平关系」的感觉。
example: I'm going to level with you — if the testing coverage doesn't improve by next sprint, we can't ship on time.
exampleTranslation: 我跟你说实话——如果下个 sprint 测试覆盖率还没上来，我们就没法按时发布。

expression: There's no great way to say this, so I'll just say it
literalTranslation: 没有什么好的方式说这个，所以我就直说了
naturalMeaning: 承认话题尴尬，选择直接切入主题，不做过多的铺垫。
example: There's no great way to say this, so I'll just say it — your role is being restructured and you'll be moving to a different team.
exampleTranslation: 这事怎么说都不太好听，我就直说了——你的岗位要调整了，你会被调到另一个团队。

expression: I want to be transparent about where things stand
literalTranslation: 我想透明地告诉你事情目前的状态
naturalMeaning: 表示接下来要坦诚告知现状，可能是不好的消息，但不隐瞒。
example: I want to be transparent about where things stand — the budget for the new hire has been frozen until next quarter.
exampleTranslation: 我想跟你透明地说一下目前的情况——新 headcount 的预算被冻结到下个季度了。

expression: I'm not going to sugarcoat this
literalTranslation: 我不会给这个裹糖衣
naturalMeaning: 表示接下来要说的话不会粉饰美化，就是赤裸裸的事实。
example: I'm not going to sugarcoat this — the Q1 results were below expectations and your team was the biggest miss.
exampleTranslation: 我不打算美化什么——Q1 的结果低于预期，你们团队差距最大。

expression: I know this isn't what you were hoping to hear
literalTranslation: 我知道这不是你想听到的
naturalMeaning: 说坏话时表达共情，承认现实与期望的差距。
example: I know this isn't what you were hoping to hear, but the promotion isn't happening this cycle.
exampleTranslation: 我知道这不是你想听的，但这次晋升没有通过。

expression: Let me give it to you straight
literalTranslation: 让我直截了当地告诉你
naturalMeaning: 在说不好听的话之前告诉对方我要直说了，不绕圈子。
example: Let me give it to you straight — your communications with the client have been rubbing them the wrong way.
exampleTranslation: 我就直说了——你和客户沟通的方式让他们不太舒服。

expression: Look, I'm not going to lie to you
literalTranslation: 听着，我不会骗你
naturalMeaning: 用非常坦诚的语气开场，表示下面说的都是真心话。
example: Look, I'm not going to lie to you — this is going to be a lot harder than the initial estimate suggested.
exampleTranslation: 听着，我不跟你撒谎——这件事比最初预估的要难得多。

expression: This is a muscle you can build over time
literalTranslation: 这是一块你可以随着时间慢慢锻炼出来的肌肉
naturalMeaning: 用锻炼肌肉比喻可培养的能力，传达成长型思维。
example: Public speaking doesn't come naturally to most people, but it's a muscle you can build over time.
exampleTranslation: 公开演讲对大多数人来说都不是天生的，但这是可以慢慢锻炼出来的能力。

expression: I'd love to see you push yourself on this
literalTranslation: 我很想看到你在这方面推自己一把
naturalMeaning: 鼓励对方走出舒适区、挑战自己，语气是支持而不是施压。
example: You're already great at writing backend code, but I'd love to see you push yourself on the frontend side too.
exampleTranslation: 你后端代码已经写得很好了，但我很想看到你在前端方面也挑战一下自己。

expression: You've got a lot of raw talent here, now it's about refining it
literalTranslation: 你这里有大量原始天赋，现在要做的是打磨它
naturalMeaning: 先肯定对方有天赋和潜力，再说需要打磨和精进的地方。
example: You've got a lot of raw talent here, now it's about refining it — paying attention to the small details in your code.
exampleTranslation: 你很有天赋，现在要做的是精雕细琢——多注意代码里的小细节。

expression: This is totally coachable
literalTranslation: 这完全是可以教练的
naturalMeaning: 告诉对方某个不足是可以通过学习和训练改善的，不需要天赋。
example: Don't worry about struggling with estimation — that's totally coachable. Everyone gets better at it with practice.
exampleTranslation: 别担心估算不准——这完全是可以学会的，多练习都会变好的。

expression: The next level for you is...
literalTranslation: 对你的下一级是……
naturalMeaning: 指出对方在当前水平之上可以进一步发展的方向，帮助规划成长路径。
example: The next level for you is learning to delegate instead of doing everything yourself.
exampleTranslation: 你的下一步成长是学会分派任务，而不是什么事都自己做。

expression: Think of this as building out your toolkit
literalTranslation: 把这个看作是在打造你的工具箱
naturalMeaning: 用工具箱比喻各种技能和方法的积累，让成长听起来很实用。
example: Think of this as building out your toolkit — every new communication technique is another tool you can pull out when needed.
exampleTranslation: 把这个看成是在扩充你的工具箱——每学会一种沟通技巧就是多了一件可以拿出来用的工具。

expression: You're already good at X, so let's work on Y
literalTranslation: 你已经很擅长 X 了，所以让我们来练 Y
naturalMeaning: 先肯定已有的能力，再提出需要提升的方面，用"let's"表示一起努力。
example: You're already good at writing clean code, so let's work on communicating your design decisions more clearly in docs.
exampleTranslation: 你写干净代码已经很好了，所以我们来练练怎么在文档中更清楚地传达你的设计思路。

expression: This is one of those things that gets easier the more you do it
literalTranslation: 这是那种做得越多越容易的事情
naturalMeaning: 鼓励对方多练习，告诉对方现在的困难只是暂时的。
example: Giving performance feedback feels awkward at first, but this is one of those things that gets easier the more you do it.
exampleTranslation: 给绩效反馈一开始都会觉得尴尬，但这是那种越做越顺手的事。
